seoTitle: South Greenough vs South Hedland — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between South Greenough and South Hedland. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: South Greenough vs South Hedland: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in South Greenough and South Hedland.
heading: South Greenough vs South Hedland — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between South Greenough, Western Australia and South Hedland, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: South Hedland has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to South Greenough (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is South Greenough or South Hedland safer from flooding?
faq.answer: South Greenough has a flood risk score of 43/100, while South Hedland scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: South Greenough scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. South Hedland scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in South Greenough or South Hedland?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. South Hedland has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
